overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a sci-fi industrial outpost at night. The character walks through an open plaza with metal structures and rocky cliffs, ascends a long staircase, and explores an upper platform with picnic tables and industrial doors. The environment features dramatic artificial lighting with neon accents against a dark red alien sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial plaza with metal structures and scaffolding

events.description: an NPC figure becomes visible standing near the building entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial plaza toward the main building complex

notable_agents.action: standing near the building entrance watching the approach

entered.detail: multi-story metal industrial structure with illuminated windows and orange accent lighting
large natural rock formation with reddish texture forming the backdrop
tall metal scaffold structures with platforms and cranes
tall thin spire visible in the distance against the red sky
yellow and grey industrial containers and crates stacked near the scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open industrial plaza with metal grating flooring, approaching a multi-story building complex. Rocky cliffs loom on the right while metal scaffolding and storage containers fill the left side. An NPC stands near the building entrance ahead, and the environment is lit by artificial lights against a dark red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase between industrial building and cliff face

events.description: character begins ascending the long metal staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the long metal staircase between the industrial building and cliff face

entered.detail: long metal staircase with white safety stripes and textured steps leading upward
metal safety railings along the right edge of the staircase
rocky overhang visible at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long metal staircase between the industrial building wall on the left and the rocky cliff face on the right. The staircase features white safety stripes and metal railings, leading upward into a more enclosed space with a rocky overhang visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated platform with seating and industrial doors

events.description: reaches the top of stairs and enters the elevated platform area
character stops ascending and begins panning camera to explore the platform

agents.ego_description: walking across the platform and examining the seating area and industrial doors

entered.detail: metal table with attached benches and scattered items on the surface
large green metal double doors with red warning lights above the frame
tall grey industrial storage lockers against the building wall
large rock formation overhead providing partial cover to the platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters an elevated platform area featuring metal picnic tables and large industrial security doors with red warning lights. The space is partially covered by an overhanging rock formation. The character explores the area, examining the tables, lockers, and doors before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive industrial plaza up into a secluded, elevated outpost under a dark red sky. It begins with the character traversing a metal grating floor, moving past storage containers and scaffolding toward a multi-story building complex flanked by looming rocky cliffs. As the character reaches the building, the perspective shifts upward, ascending a long metal staircase marked with white safety stripes that winds between the industrial wall and the cliff face. The scene then opens onto an elevated platform sheltered by a rocky overhang, where the environment transitions from a transit corridor to a functional living area. Finally, the camera explores this upper level, passing by metal picnic tables and lockers before settling on large industrial security doors illuminated by red warning lights.
